case_title: AISLYN WOOD VS. MICRODERM SYSTEMS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOOD, AISLYN AS TO DEFENDANT MICRODERM SYSTEMS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ESEA SKIN CARE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
